hero.text: Hi, I'm Santiago Mejía Suárez, a multimedia engineer who is passionate about technology and design.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.caficultorText: An educational virtual reality experience for Meta Quest that teaches the coffee process through immersive interactions in Unity.
projects.bankText: Web application with user authentication, secure registration, and session management using Node.js, MySQL, and bcrypt.
projects.modelText: Modeling, texturing, and rendering of a realistic gaming PC using Blender, Substance 3D Painter, and Cycles.
projects.fantaText: Branding project that included visual identity creation, graphic pieces, and an advertising spot for a conceptual brand.
projects.residentText: A 3D video game inspired by Resident Evil with enemy AI, puzzles, and classic mechanics developed in Unity.
projects.molassaultText: Narrative video game and logbook-style web platform developed at Nebuly Studios with Unity, web development, and AI tools.

caficultorPage.title: Caficultor VR
caficultorPage.summary: Immersive Meta Quest experience about best practices in the coffee process.
caficultorPage.overviewText: Caficultor VR is an immersive experience developed in Unity for Meta Quest devices, designed to teach best practices in the coffee process, from harvesting to packaging.
caficultorPage.roleText: I contributed to VR mechanics, user flow, audio and animation integration, C# programming, and collaboration on the guide character Remegio.
caficultorPage.contribution1: VR mechanics with XR Interaction Toolkit.
caficultorPage.contribution2: User flow for the different coffee stages.
caficultorPage.contribution5: Collaboration on the guide character Remegio.

molassaultPage.title: Molassault
molassaultPage.summary: 3D narrative adventure about friendship, truth, and corporate negligence.
molassaultPage.overviewText: Molassault is a third-person narrative adventure game that combines exploration, light parkour, environmental puzzles, and a cinematic story. Nico must cross his devastated town to rescue Tomi after the collapse of an industrial molasses tank.
molassaultPage.roleText: I contributed to mechanics design, narrative structure, general creative direction, and documentation of the video game development process.
molassaultPage.contribution1: Design of exploration, light parkour, and environmental puzzle mechanics.
molassaultPage.contribution2: Narrative structure around Nico, Tomi, and the industrial disaster.
molassaultPage.contribution3: Documentation of progress, milestones, and design decisions.
molassaultPage.contribution4: Integration of narrative elements and cinematic pacing.
molassaultPage.result1: Functional narrative prototype with weekly progress.
molassaultPage.result2: Learning in narrative, level design, and QA.
molassaultPage.result3: Development documentation site published on Vercel.
molassaultPage.gallery1: Main screenshot of the project site.

bankPage.title: Banco de Occidente
bankPage.summary: Functional clone with authentication, sessions, bcrypt, Node.js, and MySQL.
bankPage.overviewText: Full stack project that replicates basic features of the Banco de Occidente portal: user registration, login, logout, password encryption, and MySQL persistence.
bankPage.roleText: I developed the authentication logic, database connection, session handling, and visual structure based on the original portal.
bankPage.result3: Frontend-backend integration in a local environment.
bankPage.gallery1: Main view of the functional clone.

fantaPage.title: Fanta Blast
fantaPage.summary: Complete brand creation from scratch, from naming to promotional pieces.
fantaPage.overviewText: Fanta Blast was a complete brand creation exercise, including naming, visual identity, logo, stationery, promotional material, and an advertising spot.
fantaPage.roleText: I worked on the brand's visual concept, graphic applications, and promotional pieces aligned with the proposed identity.
fantaPage.result3: Learning in visual direction and brand communication.

residentPage.title: Resident Evil Remake
residentPage.summary: Video game inspired by Resident Evil 1 developed in Unity with AI, puzzles, and main menu.
residentPage.overviewText: 3D video game project inspired by Resident Evil 1, focused on recreating classic exploration, tension, enemies, and puzzle-solving mechanics inside Unity.
residentPage.roleText: I contributed to mechanics development, optimization, version control, and collaborative work to build a playable experience.

pcPage.title: Gaming PC Model
pcPage.summary: Realistic gaming PC model developed in Blender, Substance 3D Painter, and Cycles.
pcPage.overviewText: Realistic modeling project of a gaming PC, focused on hard-surface construction, visual detail, PBR texturing, and final rendering for visualization.
pcPage.roleText: I completed the modeling, texturing, material setup, lighting, and final rendering process for the object.
pcPage.result2: Improved PBR materials and surface detail.
pcPage.result3: Greater control over rendering, composition, and lighting.

about.title: About Me
about.text:
Passionate about developing interactive digital experiences, with a focus on XR technologies (Augmented, Virtual, and Mixed Reality), interactive design, and video game development. I have worked on virtual reality, web development, video game, and multimedia production projects, combining creativity and technology to create innovative solutions.

I have experience developing applications in Unity, designing UI/UX interfaces with Figma, 3D modeling and animation, web development, and using the Adobe suite. I focus on building immersive user-centered experiences, prioritizing usability, aesthetics, and functionality.
